optimizations: Simplify the design by removing unnecessary features or consolidating similar features ($50-$100 savings)
Optimize the stock material size to reduce waste and minimize material removal percentage ($20-$50 savings)
risks: Material removal percentage is high (44%), which may indicate a complex part with many features, potentially increasing machining time and costs.
